---
title: "Orbis"
page-layout: article
---

# Orbis

**Provider:** Moody's

## Description

Global company database covering public and private firms, ownership structures, financials, and corporate relationships. Valuable for international business and organizational research.

## Listing categories

- **Subject area:** Business & Economics
- **Data/resource type:** Company & Organization Data, Financial & Market Data, Government & International Statistics
- **Access model:** Request Required, Yale Licensed
- **Displayed topic:** Company & Organization Data, Financial & Market Data, Government & International Statistics

## Access notes

Point in-time historical data available by request

## Links

- [Access resource](https://yale.idm.oclc.org/login?url=https://orbis.bvdinfo.com/ip)

[Back to Datasets & Databases](../datasets.qmd)
